description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by lush landscaping, including several large trees and manicured shrubs. The structure features a mix of brick and painted exterior walls, with large windows and multiple entry points visible from different sides. The front facade is defined by a prominent entry door, flanked by windows and a driveway leading up to the house. At the rear, there is a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool and a patio area, ideal for outdoor activities. The roof is flat, with some sections possibly accommodating skylights or solar panels. The overall layout is open and modern, with clear separations between living spaces, outdoor amenities, and green areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, brick and painted walls, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with large trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and garden beds.
description_view_2: Back facade with a clear view of the pool, patio furniture, and multiple rear-facing windows.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the pool, side entrance, and the driveway extending along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
